name: Town Of Barnes Park
description: Come play pickleball at Town Of Barnes Park in Solon Springs, WI! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Washburn
description: Come play pickleball at Washburn in Washburn, WI! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
